title: CC: Mono
description: Modifies the font inside terminals in ComputerCraft to have a more consistent width.
body:
# CC: Mono

![A selection of letters from the pack. From left to right: Lowercase I, lowercase L, lowercase T, lowercase F.](https://rounder.worldwidepixel.ca/?r=60&url=https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/blnQYsGj/images/8283ae42ba543afc0f0b7f0e5b6071f0bb8d361c.png)

![Requires ComputerCraft: Tweaked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8bd74165920cb260e141fe4ebbbfd4294d3d43a.png)

A few days ago, I noticed that the text in ComputerCraft's terminals is just the default Minecraft font. Now, this would be fine, if the Minecraft font was monospace. It isn't. The current solution? Just centre the characters. I don't like this solution because it makes the kerning look really off. So, I created something to fix it.

*Supports 1.17 to 1.20.6*
